scripts.start:gateway: cd api-gateway && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:auth: cd auth-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:user: cd user-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:chat: cd chat-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:confession: cd confession-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:event: cd event-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:matching: cd matching-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.start:moderation: cd moderation-service && npm install && npm start
scripts.dev: npm install concurrently && concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:chat" "npm run start:confession" "npm run start:event" "npm run start:matching" "npm run start:moderation"
scripts.install:all: npm install && for dir in */; do (cd "$dir" && npm install); done
